---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that isn't working correctly
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...' or scroll to '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened.

## Environment

- **Browser:** (e.g. Chrome 120, Firefox 121, Edge 120)
- **Userscript manager:** (e.g. Tampermonkey 5.0, Violentmonkey 2.15)
- **Script version:** (e.g. 2.0 — check the Tampermonkey dashboard or `// @version` in the script header)
- **Site:** x.com or twitter.com

## Console errors

If applicable, paste any errors from the browser developer console (F12 → Console).

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.
